title: bihai mariae
intro: Bihai mariae, also known as Bihari, is a plant species that belongs to the family of Asteraceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Bihai mariae has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote immune function. Its herbal preparations, which include teas, infusions, and extracts, are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections, and are also used to support cardiovascular health and improve digestion.
